gateTitle: Gemini Invocation Required For Cognitive Story Lane
purpose: Block cognitive Story-to-TDD lanes unless the declared Gemini Flash worker executes live and leaves dispatch, response, and invocation receipt evidence.
passConditions: LOC_GEMINI_API_KEY is available to the worker invocation boundary without being written to evidence
Gemini response is fresh for the current source hash and slice key
Gemini response is accepted only through declared gates
completionPosture: If a Story-to-TDD lane claims cognitive compile authority, Gemini Flash must have actually run and left receipts.
